In mito2::cache

Module mito2::cache::file_cache

source ·
Expand description

A cache for files.

Structs§

  • FileCache 🔒
    A file cache manages files on local store and evict files based on size.
  • IndexKey 🔒
    Key of file cache index.
  • IndexValue 🔒
    An entity that describes the file in the file cache.

Enums§

  • FileType
    Type of the file.

Constants§

  • FILE_DIR 🔒
    Subdirectory of cached files.

Functions§

  • cache_file_path 🔒
    Generates the path to the cached file.
  • parse_index_key 🔒
    Parse index key from the file name.

Type Aliases§

  • FileCacheRef 🔒
